opinion.h: Victor SHARROW, petitioner, v. George H. BROWN, etc. No. 71-5762.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit.
Mr. Justice MARSHALL took no part in the consideration or decision of this petition.[ Sharrow v. Brown 405 U.S. 968 (1972) ]
